example_reviews: App crashes and glitches during sleep sessions.
Experiencing issues on various devices including old and new phones.
groups.notes: Refined T1 by narrowing the focus to high-impact stability failures; moved minor UI alignment complaints to a separate internal log.

example_reviews: Difficulty in canceling subscriptions and inability to get refunds.
Frustration with paywalls limiting access to basic content.
groups.notes: Merged T2 and T5; human review identified that users perceive billing errors and paywall intrusiveness as a single monetization frustration.

example_reviews: Limited control over content preferences and personalized relaxation.
groups.notes: Renamed 'Feature Requests' (T3) to a more specific functional theme focused on offline utility and user-driven customization.

example_reviews: Limited access to valuable content without payment.
groups.notes: Refined T4 to specifically address the 'Price-to-Value' discrepancy reported by health enthusiasts rather than general content feedback.
